practiceChallenge.title: Fill in the graph-traversal clues
practiceChallenge.description: Complete the helper so it returns the right idea for DFS, BFS, and visited memory in graphs.
hints: DFS goes down one route first.
BFS looks at the nearest nodes first.
practiceChallenge.successMessage: Nice work. You rebuilt the main graph-traversal clues.
practiceChallenge.retryMessage: Not yet. Recheck how DFS, BFS, and visited memory each help in a graph.
